ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cognitive_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive function */,
  "function_category" TEXT /* Category of the cognitive function (e.g., Memory, Executive Functions) */,
  "function_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory or specific aspect of the cognitive function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cognitive function or subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_impairments" (
  "impairment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive impairment */,
  "impairment_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive impairment (e.g., Dyslexia, Aphasia) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cognitive impairment */,
  "severity_levels" TEXT /* Severity levels of the impairment (e.g., Mild, Moderate, Severe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impairment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impairment_function_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "impairment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive impairment */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive function */,
  "affected_subcategory" TEXT /* Specific subcategory of the cognitive function that is affected */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact of the impairment on the cognitive function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impairment_function_map_impairment_id FOREIGN KEY ("impairment_id") REFERENCES cognitive_impairments ("impairment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impairment_function_map_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES cognitive_functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient's cognitive impairment */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Details of the patient's treatment plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_diagnosis FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosis") REFERENCES cognitive_impairments ("impairment_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assessment */,
  "assessment_type" TEXT /* Type of assessment (e.g., clinical, self-report) */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the assessment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_assessments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research study */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient participating in the study */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date the patient participated in the study */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, therapist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_provider_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_map_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_provider_map_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)
